evals.name: wrap-up-feature-branch
evals.prompt: Ship this. I'm on feature/14-add-handoff-skill and everything is committed.
evals.expected_output: Detects feature branch (not main). Verifies working tree is clean. Reads git diff main...HEAD to detect a new skill was added (skills/handoff/). Updates CHANGELOG.md under ## [Unreleased] ### Added with a handoff bullet. Updates README.md skills table with handoff row. Updates .claude-plugin/marketplace.json with handoff entry. Commits those admin changes with 'chore(handoff): update changelog, readme, and marketplace'. Pushes the branch. Creates a draft PR with type(scope): subject title and the PR template body including the Skill Checklist section. Prints the PR URL.
expectations: Confirms working tree is clean before proceeding (git status --porcelain is empty)
Detects that a new skill directory skills/handoff/ was added (not just modified)
Updates CHANGELOG.md under ## [Unreleased] with a ### Added bullet for handoff
Updates README.md skills table with a new row for handoff
Updates .claude-plugin/marketplace.json with a new handoff plugin entry
Commits only CHANGELOG.md, README.md, and marketplace.json (not other files)
Commit message follows chore(<skill-name>): convention
Pushes the branch to origin
Creates a draft PR (--draft flag)
PR title follows type(scope): subject format
PR body includes the Skill Checklist section
Prints the PR URL to the user

evals.name: cut-release-on-main
evals.prompt: Cut a release. I'm on main, everything is merged and clean.
evals.expected_output: Verifies on main, working tree clean, up to date with origin. Gets last tag (e.g. v1.0.0) and lists commits since. Applies semver rules: feat commits → minor bump → v1.1.0. Presents proposed version and the driving commits, waits for confirmation. Updates CHANGELOG.md: renames ## [Unreleased] to ## [1.1.0] - 2026-04-25, inserts fresh ## [Unreleased] above, updates comparison links at bottom. Commits with 'chore(release): cut v1.1.0 release'. Tags v1.1.0. Pushes commit and tag. Creates draft GitHub release. Tells user to publish manually.
expectations: Confirms currently on main branch
Confirms working tree is clean
Runs git fetch origin and confirms no commits behind
Reads last tag with git describe --tags --abbrev=0
Lists commits since last tag to determine version bump
Presents proposed version and waits for explicit user confirmation
CHANGELOG.md has old [Unreleased] renamed to [X.Y.Z] - YYYY-MM-DD
CHANGELOG.md has a new empty ## [Unreleased] inserted above the versioned section
Comparison links at the bottom of CHANGELOG.md are updated
Commit message is exactly 'chore(release): cut vX.Y.Z release'
An annotated tag is created (git tag -a vX.Y.Z)
Both the commit and the tag are pushed to origin
A draft GitHub release is created (not published)
User is told to publish the release manually
